review_comment:
Note that this is a pretty shoddy API. It's improved in the newer version of messagepack. I've implemented this copying the way the official formatters are implemented in the previous version, as there is no direct documentation on the interface itself.

You can find examples here: https://github.com/neuecc/MessagePack-CSharp/blob/v1.7.3.7/src/MessagePack/Formatters/PrimitiveFormatter.cs / https://github.com/neuecc/MessagePack-CSharp/blob/v1.7.3.7/src/MessagePack.UnityShims/Formatters.cs
